title: 5 questions a man of God asks before he acts
caption:
You act first. Ask later. Then wonder why it went sideways.

Most men never break that cycle because nobody ever taught them to stop before they move. So here are five questions worth asking first — before the text, before the yes, before the thing you've already talked yourself into.

1. Will I be proud of this at 40?
2. Whose voice am I listening to right now?
3. Am I following, or am I forcing?
4. What does this cost the man I'm becoming?
5. Can I pray before I do it?

That last one is the simplest test. If you'd be embarrassed to bring it to God first — that's your answer. "Commit your work to the LORD, and your plans will be established." — Proverbs 16:3

A man of God doesn't move slow. He moves right.

—

theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
